author: y4rr
content: Audit follow-up #1/5 landed via architect-mode + opus 4.7 (#684). Made ferrotorch-mps skeleton architecturally honest. Removed lying-success stub: init_mps_backend() now Err(DeviceUnavailable) unconditionally with docstring pointer to #451. is_mps_available()=false, mps_device_count()=0, MpsDevice::new()=Err always. Removed metal-backend feature (was a §3-shaped lie — activated zero code paths). Renamed device_count→mps_device_count (PyTorch idiom + glob-export disambiguator); kept MpsDevice::count() as sibling. Added Debug+Clone+Copy+PartialEq+Eq+Hash derives + Display(mps:{ordinal}) impl on MpsDevice. Added lint baseline matching jit reference shape (warn pedantic + 1 narrow allow w/ justification + deny missing_docs). Simplified 5 tests to assert always-unavailable contract uniformly (no platform conditionals). NO new deps (still only ferrotorch-core), NO new cfg blocks, NO MSL kernel code, NO MpsBackendImpl constructed. All 8 audit findings addressed (3🔴+4🟡+1🟢). Verifications PASS: cargo build, clippy -D warnings (0), 5/5 tests, fmt, workspace build. Architect-mode trial #3 (opus): clean 1-round APPROVE, no REDIRECT. 5/5 architect dispatches now run; 3 of 3 with opus = clean 1-round, 1 of 1 with sonnet = 1.5-round. Next: crate #2 of 5 = ferrotorch-core.
